hero.sub: ZAYA links the shops, customers and families of your neighbourhood — so you can find what's near you, sell smarter, and provide for the people you love.
hero.statusLive: Sales, stock & the credit book for shops — plus the supermarket dashboard.
hero.statusLaunching: The customer app — search & order nearby.
hero.statusRoadmap: Delivery, smart tools & voice, the diaspora basket.

showcase.heading: Built with the shops that run the neighbourhood.
showcase.sub: From the corner mini-market to the supermarket — this is where ZAYA works.

solutions.heading: One platform that removes the everyday friction of local commerce.
solutions.sub: Real tools for real problems — honestly labelled by what's live today and what's on the way.

cinematic.heading: One platform behind every shop on the street.
cinematic.sub: From the corner mini-market to the supermarket — ZAYA connects the whole neighbourhood.

diaspora.heading: Provide for your family — real goods, not cash into the dark.
diaspora.sub: A trusted neighbourhood shop, delivered locally, with proof it arrived. ZAYA is not a money-transfer service.

pricing.heading: Simple plans. No hidden fees.
pricing.sub: Customers use ZAYA free. Merchants start free — forever — and upgrade only when it helps.

contact.heading: Let's grow your shop together.
contact.sub: Call, message, email, or visit — we answer every message ourselves.
